ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the document:  Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys Limited (IMFA) has formally appointed Dr. Deepak Kumar Mohanty as an Additional Non-Executive Independent Director, effective June 30, 2026, following receipt of the necessary security clearance. This appointment is a material positive for corporate governance, significantly bolstering the board with Dr. Mohanty's extensive expertise in economics, financial regulation, and policy, garnered from his senior roles at the RBI, PFRDA, and IMF, with no red flags identified.
